text:
Though almost predictable and with a one tactical approach, Emmanuel Wanyonyi will be remembered for being the only Kenyan man to win a gold medal at the 2024 Paris Olympic Games.All the other Kenyan male athletes either won a silver or bronze medal at the Games that ended at the Stade de France yesterday.Get Full Access for Ksh299/WeekUnlock the Full Story — Join Thousands of Informed Kenyans TodayUnlock the Truth Now 》Unlimited access to all premium contentUninterrupted ad-free browsing experienceMobile-optimized reading experienceWeekly NewslettersMPesa, Airtel Money and Cards acceptedAlready a subscriber?Log in

title: Paris 2024: How Rudisha's pep talk spurred Wanyonyi to Olympic glory
author: Rodgers Eshitemi in Paris
description: The world silver medallist clinched 800m gold on his Olympic debut.
